playlists.name: Modern Pop Glow
playlists.description: A vibrant and catchy collection of contemporary pop tunes featuring energetic beats, heartfelt vocals, and polished production from the mid-2010s to the mid-2020s, perfect for uplifting moods and everyday listening.
playlists.cover_prompt: bright city skyline at dusk, glowing lights, warm tones, polished modern aesthetic

playlists.name: Soulful & Soft Reflections
playlists.description: This playlist offers a tender mix of soft pop, pop soul, and smooth emotional ballads from modern voices to timeless classics, designed for intimate moments and reflective moods.
playlists.cover_prompt: warm golden hour sunlight shining through translucent curtains, soft and soothing colors

playlists.name: Timeless Rock Drive
playlists.description: Classic and hard rock anthems from the 70s to the 80s with driving guitars, powerful vocals, and unforgettable melodies for cruising or amp-up moments.
playlists.cover_prompt: open highway at sunset, vintage car dashboard, warm oranges and reds, retro style

playlists.name: Dreamy Ambient Folk
playlists.description: A soothing blend of ambient folk and dream pop with lush soundscapes and delicate vocals, perfect for relaxation, introspection, or peaceful background music.
playlists.cover_prompt: misty forest at dawn, soft pastel colors, ethereal light rays, serene and calm atmosphere

playlists.name: Urban Latin & Afro Vibes
playlists.description: Pulsing rhythms from reggaeton, afrobeat, and urbano latino styles blending energetic flows and danceable beats for an immersive modern global party experience.
playlists.cover_prompt: night city street with colorful neon lights, energetic crowd dancing, warm vibrant hues

playlists.name: Indie Psychedelic & Introspective
playlists.description: A textured and explorative collection of neo-psychedelic, indie, and haunting tunes with rich layers and introspective moods from the mid-2010s onward.
playlists.cover_prompt: psychedelic swirls, twilight sky with stars, mystical forest shadows, deep blues and purples
